title: Rayaru Bandaru Mavana Manege
desc: Suma and Vishnu act as a married couple to please her father. However, they get into trouble when her father finds out the truth.

title: Zombie Kumar
desc: A video game developer and his companions travel to a village to attend their friend's wedding. However, their holiday turns into a nightmare due to a sudden zombie apocalypse.

title: Rowdy Boys
desc: Kavya, a medical student, and Akshay, an engineering student, begin to fall for each other. However, an ugly gang war between their respective colleges impacts their love story.

title: Boss
desc: Ram and Raj are estranged twins. When Raj learns that Ram has been mysteriously murdered, he sets out to avenge his death.

title: Bulbul
desc: A gangster's daughter attempts suicide after Vijay spurns her. When threatened, Vijay falsely claims to love his childhood friend, unwittingly inviting further complications.

title: Premalu
desc: Having been rejected once, Sachin, a young man, falls for Reenu, a girl he meets during a wedding and sets out to win her over.
